libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Do not base the fix on org.apache.pekko.http.ccompat.pre213/since213: those classes existed in 1.3.0 but are absent from the 2.0.0-M1 jar. Focus coverage on org.apache.pekko.macros.LogHelper and LogHelperMacro. These are internal/private-to-pekko APIs, so direct Scala references may need the test code to be in an org.apache.pekko package or otherwise use reflection where appropriate.

deterministic_setup.reason: The 2.0.0-M1 POM and upstream build declare pekko-actor as a provided dependency, and org.apache.pekko.macros.LogHelper exposes org.apache.pekko.event.LoggingAdapter from that artifact.

The artifact's Scala 2 macro implementation uses scala.reflect.macros.blackbox; scala-reflect should be present and aligned with the repository Scala 2 compiler version used by the generated Scala scaffold.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8878 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-parsing_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact is mostly internal macro support, so meaningful coverage may be limited and may require Scala-specific tests rather than Java-only scaffolding.
The upstream 2.0.0-M1 POM lists scala-reflect 2.13.18, while this repository currently uses Scala 2.13.17 for Scala test compilation; local Gradle resolution remains authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: org.apache.pekko:pekko-parsing_2.13:2.0.0-M1 is a very small internal Pekko HTTP parsing/macro artifact whose usable classes reference Pekko actor logging APIs declared as provided; meaningful tests will need that provided Pekko actor dependency on the test classpath.
